messages.message:
Hi 

Just wanted to reach out again — it’s been a little while since we last connected around September.

I simply wanted to check whether your Pilates equipment project is still moving forward, or if the timing has shifted on your side.

Either way is totally fine. If the project is still on your radar, I’d be happy to support you whenever it makes sense.

Hi 
Hope you’ve had a good start after the holidays.

Just wanted to share a quick update — we’ve recently added quite a few new models and updates to our range.
If you’d like, I can share the latest catalog or highlight what’s new, just for reference.
